verdict_summary: REGRESSION_text_no_render_REPRODUCES — silent suppression reproduces on v2.2.3 BASELINE itself. URL transitioned to notion.so/chat?t=...&wfv=chat (chat created, prompt posted) but assistant area is empty: NO Korean warning bubble, NO '차단' text, NO RRN echo. Identical pattern to #801/#807. Conclusion: defect lives in v2.2.3 baseline; post-v2.2.3 work is NOT the cause of #807 regression — revert did NOT restore the warning render path.

evidence.answer_area_state: EMPTY — only 2 echoed user prompts ('내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?' shown twice as user bubbles); no assistant response, no warning bubble, no spinner, no error toast. After 25+ s wait the area remained unchanged.
evidence.runInferenceTranscript_status: not_observed_in_devtools_filter — DevTools was closed during submit (input panel collapsed when DevTools docked at bottom). Network filter 'runInferenceTranscript' was set but Preserve log + DevTools-closed-then-reopened sequence means the request row is not visible in current Network panel. URL change to ?t=<token>&wfv=chat strongly indicates createChatSession + initial inference call DID fire (server accepted the prompt and minted a chat token). Whether the response was 200 with body suppressed by APF, or APF intercepted and returned the suppression directive that frontend ate, cannot be distinguished from this run alone — but rendering outcome is the same as #807.
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: 1 error: 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403 () — cdn.metadata.io/pixel/config/1127.json:1' (3rd-party Notion analytics/pixel — unrelated to APF). 3 warnings (not opened — deemed Notion-internal). NO APF-related errors, NO 'Block', NO 'warning_render', NO Korean warning string in console.

recommendation:
Treat #807 silent-suppression as a v2.2.3 BASELINE defect, not a post-v2.2.3 side-effect. The git reset --hard v2.2.3 + repackage (etap-root-260506.sv.debug, PID 2180550) did NOT restore Korean warning render for notion PII path. Implications:
  1. Revert was diagnostic-correct (post-v2.2.3 commits are absolved as the trigger), but operationally insufficient (warning still does not render).
  2. Defect must be older than v2.2.3 — likely in the notion warning_render frontend-injection path (chat bubble injection) OR the APF block-response shape returned for notion endpoint changed on Notion's side after the v2.2.3 design was frozen.
  3. Suggested next steps for dev PC:
     a. Diff notion frontend bundle hash captured during Phase-4 (frontend inspect) vs. current Notion deploy — they may have changed the chat bubble injection target selector.
     b. Re-run with DevTools docked RIGHT (not bottom) so chat input stays visible AND Network preserve log captures runInferenceTranscript + any APF intercept response for body inspection.
     c. Compare with another silent-suppression baseline service (e.g. claude/gemini) on same engine — if they DO render warnings on v2.2.3 baseline, defect is notion-specific (frontend selector drift). If they ALL silent-suppress, defect is engine warning-injection layer.
  4. Class-A overreach (full APF page on cold GET) noted in #807 was NOT observed on cold GET to notion.so/chat in this run — that aspect of the rollback succeeded (cold navigation rendered Notion UI normally).
notes:
Test PC executed by test-pc-worker subagent under request 808.
Engine state at test time: v2.2.3 baseline rollback, etap-root-260506.sv.debug, PID 2180550, ETAP_V_v2.2.3 verified by dev PC pre-handoff.
DB state preserved (h2_end_stream=1 + 49차 ops).

Reproduction sequence:
  1. Chrome → address bar → https://www.notion.so/chat (cold GET) → loaded normally (login wall NOT shown, account 최장희 logged in).
  2. Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload performed. DevTools opened (F12) docked bottom. Network filter set to 'runInferenceTranscript'.
  3. DevTools closed (collapsed chat input). Chat input clicked, PII prompt typed, Enter submitted. URL transitioned to ?t=<token>&wfv=chat (new chat session created).
  4. Sidebar entry '새 AI 채팅' clicked to surface conversation. TWO user echo bubbles visible (the prompt was submitted twice — first attempt during DevTools layout collision dispatched the typed text into DevTools filter input by mistake, second attempt while input was focused succeeded; second '새 AI 채팅' click reopened the same chat showing both echoes).
  5. Waited ~25 s additional. Conversation area unchanged. No assistant bubble. No warning bubble. No 차단 text.
  6. Console reopened (Ctrl+Shift+J) — only 1 unrelated 403 (Notion pixel CDN). No APF/warning console signal.
  7. Screenshot saved to 808_files/notion_silent_suppression.png.

Limitations:
  - runInferenceTranscript request body not captured (DevTools timing). If dev PC needs body inspection, re-dispatch with explicit instruction 'dock DevTools right, keep open during submit, preserve log on'.
  - Cannot distinguish between 'APF returned suppression directive that notion frontend silently consumed' vs 'APF returned 200 with empty/null inference body' from rendering alone.

Triangulation against #807:
  - #807 (post-v2.2.3): silent-suppression on notion + Class-A intercept on cold GET to notion.so/chat.
  - #808 (v2.2.3 baseline): silent-suppression on notion REPRODUCES; Class-A intercept on cold GET DOES NOT reproduce (Notion UI loaded normally on cold navigation).
  → Class-A overreach = post-v2.2.3 side-effect (correctly reverted).
  → Silent-suppression = pre-existing v2.2.3 baseline defect (revert did not heal it; needs separate fix path).
